intro: Zina (meaning: shining; going back) was a son of Shimei the Gershonite Levite (1 Chr. 23:10). He is listed among the sons of Shimei in the organization of the Levites under David's administration, though the parallel verse (1 Chr. 23:11) names his brother Zizah as the one who, together with Jeush, formed a unit counted as a single father's house because their combined number was small. The two names Zina and Zizah may represent variant forms of the same name or a scribal variation between manuscripts.
